title: indigofera fruticosa
intro: Indigofera fruticosa, also known as Indian licorice or kala jamun, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Indigofera fruticosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Indigofera fruticosa is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
